nasb.text: (though he himself did not do any of these things), that is, he even eats at the mountain shrines, and defiles his neighbor’s wife,

esv.text: (though he himself did none of these things), who even eats upon the mountains, defiles his neighbor’s wife,

cnv.text: ：他在山上吃祭肉，又玷污鄰舍的妻子；

ccb.text: 常在庙宇吃祭偶像之物，玷污别人的妻子，
